title: No raw CRUD UI — workflow-task screens engine + BUSINESS-USABLE SCREEN DESIGN GATE (P0.12)
business_reason: The UI was generated from the data model, so ~93% of screens (81 of 87) were raw table editors exposing payload/JSON/uuid/status fields (e.g. answer-keys: a raw 'Answer Key Payload' box). Clean DATA+LIFECYCLE specs were not a clean SCREEN. Fix it at the generator level + add a hard gate so it can never regress.

design.engine: _validation/_ui_fields.py — a field-classification engine the generators consume: FK -> reference PICKER, enum -> labeled SELECT, payload/json/metadata/*_by/hash/internal-id/own-code/status -> HIDDEN, date/number/bool -> typed, else business-labeled text. Humanized labels (exam_cycle_id -> 'Exam Cycle'), task-framed titles.
design.reference_pickers: one generic /api/staff/lookup/[table] returns {value,label} for any FK-target table (label = its code/name), so EVERY reference is a business dropdown with no per-table wiring; gen_ui emits server/lookups/labelColumns.generated.ts (the whitelist).
design.component: ModuleTable renders type 'reference' (fetches the lookup), labeled {value,label} selects, and 'Create <Singular>' / 'New <Singular>' task CTAs (was 'New record').
design.validator: _validation/check_no_raw_crud_ui.py — fails on any payload/json/metadata/uuid/*_by/status-edit createField, any real-FK (table-aware) not rendered as a picker, technical columns, or a generic 'New record'. Goal + result: 0 violations.
design.builders: a module whose required input is a payload (gen_ui prints NEEDS WORKFLOW BUILDER: evaluation_answer_keys, export_requests) needs a custom workflow builder (exports already has one; answer-keys next).

param_14.question: Are the screens usable by business users, not table editors?
param_14.answer: Yes. Generated screens are now workflow-task shaped: foreign keys are reference dropdowns of human names, enums are labeled selects, status is driven by workflow actions, payloads/internal IDs/actor fields are never exposed, and create CTAs are task-framed. A hard validator (check_no_raw_crud_ui.py) enforces 0 raw-CRUD violations across all 87 pages; modules whose core input is a payload are flagged for a custom workflow builder.
param_14.security_implications: internal IDs / actor / payload / hashes no longer shown to business users; the lookup endpoint is staff-scoped read of reference labels only.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: answer-key Q-by-Q workflow builder (NEEDS_BUILDER); school-scoped reference pickers (school lookup); a per-screen screen-contract spec as a generator input.
